name: Gingerbread Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a waffle iron.
2. With an electric mixer, beat the egg yolk until light and fluffy. Mix in the sugar.
3. Add buttermilk, molasses, and butter to the sugar-egg mixture. Stir until blended.
4. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, spices, baking soda, dry mustard, and salt.
5. Gradually add the liquid ingredients to the dry ingredients, mixing on low speed until just combined.
6. Fold in raisins and ginger.
7. Beat egg white and cream of tartar until stiff peaks form.
8. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter.
9. Pour the batter into the prepared waffle iron and cook until golden brown.
Note: For those who don't eat eggs, consider using a vegan egg substitute or omitting them altogether for a lighter texture.
